MODULE: cosmos.compatibility.task_routing
FILE: cosmos/compatibility/task_routing.py (668 lines)
CATEGORY: compatibility

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Task Routing - HermesAgent to Swarm Model Mapping
==========================================================

Routes HermesAgent tools/skills to the optimal swarm model based on task type.

Models Available:
-----------------
API-Based (External):
  - Grok: Real-time info, X/Twitter, humor, f

CLASSES:
- HermesAgentTaskType(Enum): Task types derived from HermesAgent tool groups.
- ModelCapability: Describes a model's capabilities for task routing.

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_best_model_for_task(task_type: HermesAgentTaskType, prefer_local: bool=False, prefer_fast: bool=False, prefer_qu
- def get_models_for_task(task_type: HermesAgentTaskType, limit: int=3) -> List[str]
- def get_fallback_chain(model_id: str, task_type: HermesAgentTaskType) -> List[str]
- def classify_HermesAgent_tool(tool_name: str, action: str=None) -> HermesAgentTaskType
- async def route_HermesAgent_task(tool: str, action: str=None, params: Dict=None, prefer_local: bool=False) -> Tuple[str,
- def get_model_for_channel(channel_type: str) -> str
- def get_routing_summary() -> Dict[str, Any]
